complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Create Configuration File Structure and Loading Utilities
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create directory structure and template files with .gitignore, 2) Implement YAML loader with env var substitution using python-dotenv, 3) Add Pydantic validation and unit tests for parsing/substitution.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Straightforward file setup and standard library integrations (PyYAML, dotenv, Pydantic). Low cyclomatic complexity, but involves multiple components and validation logic. Unit tests are well-defined but require mocking env vars.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into defining PlatformMessage dataclass, implementing ABC with all abstract methods, and creating basic subclass mock for testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Simple ABC and dataclass definition using standard libraries (abc, dataclasses). Minimal logic, primarily interface design. Tests focus on type safety and instantiation prevention.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Install and Verify fast-agent-mcp Framework Integration
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Dependency installation and pinning, 2) Create minimal POC agent with MCP config, 3) Implement basic ToolRunnerHook, 4) Write integration tests with mocked MCP servers.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves external framework integration (fast-agent-mcp), async WebSocket connections, tool discovery, and mocking complex external dependencies. Higher cognitive complexity due to framework-specific patterns and verification requirements.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) YAML loading, validation, and caching with Pydantic, 2) Implement exact match and glob pattern matching for tool categories with unit tests.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard YAML parsing with pattern matching (globbing). Moderate complexity from category support and caching, but well-scoped with clear test strategy.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Dataclass and storage structure (Dict + asyncio.Future), 2) Core methods (create/resolve/get_future) with timeout handling, 3) Cleanup mechanism and concurrent access unit tests.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Async complexity with asyncio.Future, timeouts, UUIDs, concurrent access, and cleanup. High cognitive complexity from state management and race condition prevention.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: 1) agent_config.py factory function, 2) ChatPlatformToolAgent class with ToolRunnerHook integration, 3) before_tool_call approval workflow, 4) Custom ToolApprovalDenied exception and status messaging.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity: framework extension (ToolAgent + hooks), async approval integration across multiple dependencies, exception handling, and tight coupling with rules/tracker/platform.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Slack app setup with slack-bolt, 2) Event handlers (app_mention, block_actions), 3) PlatformMessage normalization, 4) Approval button workflows, 5) Integration tests with mocked Slack API.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Platform-specific async event handling, WebSocket-like event loops, button interactions, API rate limiting, and factoid integration. High complexity from external SDK patterns and error handling.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Discord client setup with nextcord, 2) Message and interaction event handlers, 3) PlatformMessage normalization with thread handling, 4) Approval View components, 5) Mocked integration tests.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Similar to Slack but Discord-specific: Views, interactions, embeds, DM/channel logic, mention detection. High complexity from platform idiosyncrasies and interaction state management.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Update app.py and Integrate Factoids with Multi-Platform Support
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Multi-platform app.py initialization and shared agent, 2) FactoidManager with cooldown (in-memory/redis), 3) E2E tests for parallel platform processing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Orchestration complexity: multi-platform startup, shared state, event loop coordination, factoid caching. Moderate but spans multiple components.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Comprehensive Test Suite, Error Handling, and Documentation
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: 1) Unit test structure setup (pytest-asyncio), 2) Integration test mocking strategy, 3) E2E test scenarios, 4) Error handling/logging implementation, 5) Coverage reporting, 6) Documentation generation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Highest complexity: spans entire codebase, multiple test layers (unit/integration/E2E), async mocking (aioresponses), coverage targets, error recovery patterns, and documentation.
